rows.normalized_action: phone A dials a phone number on the dialpad.
rows.normalized_expected_result: Dialing is accepted and outgoing call is possible.

rows.normalized_action: phone A enters on keyboard the first letters of phone B user name.
phone A opens the search screen and types the first phone B user name letters.
rows.normalized_expected_result: Phone A display changes and presses the name key.

params.content: first phone B user name letters

rows.normalized_action: phone A displays the search result.
phone A presses on the key in line with phone B user name for ALE-300 or directly on the name for ALE-400 and ALE-500.
rows.normalized_expected_result: Phone B is ringing.
Phone A displays the correct information on screen: outgoing call to phone B.
Communication is established between phone A and phone B.
Phone A displays the correct information on screen: ongoing call with phone B, communication duration, and other details.
Phone A and phone B are idle.

rows.normalized_action: Make enough calls to phone B to make it full busy.
rows.normalized_expected_result: Phone B is full busy.
Phone A gives the opportunity to make a call back by pressing the right physical key.

params.content: opportunity to make a call back by pressing the right physical key

rows.normalized_expected_result: Phone A plays a voice indication that the dialed number is busy.

rows.normalized_action: phone A calls a phone number that does not exist.
rows.normalized_expected_result: Phone A displays that the dialed number is a wrong number and then becomes idle again.

params.number: a phone number that does not exist

rows.normalized_expected_result: OXE displays "xxx can not be reached".
RBH voice message says that dialed number is not available.

params.content: RBH voice message says that dialed number is not available

phone A dials phone B number.

rows.normalized_expected_result: Communication is switched on and audio is in handset mode.
